CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_products', false, 'n5JQRVnYL0x8Hyos6t0Yj3QCkhLnUhPNPI5qTqJrpvA', 'v3.5.0--N46lrz3Cp9NKY3JoI1crrvpGXqNzdc7w5j_ZOwbmEpc', 'K5m3iMMbVlP_hdvYXYfI5NgQuILKkVw0-eNvYNvaJkg'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_products; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_products (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_products VALUES ('products/products/category1/supcategory1/tet.md', 'Tet', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"_3"},"3"]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"_3","depth":2,"text":"3"}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/products/category1/supcategory1/tet', '{"description":""}', 'products/category1/supcategory1/tet', 'v1t9lCyZc4yXv9FNQAEeh6-IxgAGmOb6fmva5dF8O_Q'); -- v1t9lCyZc4yXv9FNQAEeh6-IxgAGmOb6fmva5dF8O_Q
INSERT INTO _content_products VALUES ('products/products/cayegory2/11.md', '11', '{"type":"minimark","value":[],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/products/cayegory2/11', '{"description":""}', 'products/cayegory2/11', 'M9LLf0TXq_TuWN9mgyLY2qkchWlnaxF1Fxz9wOLjUjk'); -- M9LLf0TXq_TuWN9mgyLY2qkchWlnaxF1Fxz9wOLjUjk
UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_products'; -- meta
